message: Create a full-stack URL shortener web application with: 1) A FastAPI backend with SQLite - endpoints: POST /shorten (accepts JSON with long_url, returns short_code), GET /{short_code} (redirects), GET /stats/{short_code} (returns click count and creation date). 2) A simple HTML/CSS/JS frontend with a form to submit URLs and display the shortened URL. 3) Clean project structure with separate files for models, routes, database. Include error handling for invalid URLs and missing short codes.
